issues.description: Blocker keyword effect is missing. The first effect should represent the Blocker mechanic (opponent declares attack → you may rest this card to make it the new target). Current DSL only shows Rest action without the redirection mechanic.
Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase) not 'OnAttacked' (being attacked). The second effect triggers during opponent's attack declaration, not after being targeted.

Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Effect states 'Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active', which means activating a resting DON card. Correct action should be 'Rest' with target scope 'ChooseOwnDon' to flip a DON card to active state.
Missing 'OncePerTurn' condition. The text explicitly states '[Once Per Turn]', which should be represented in the condition object.
